violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

The floors, walls, and ceilings throughout the mobile establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (front interior) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
